body:
Add dependabot, and condense UnitTest.yml and CodeCov.yml to a single action.

This fixes the issues on macos: https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/actions/runs/8915868764/job/24486253836

Closes #1691
title: Update GitHub Action

body: This PR updates us to the latest ClimaComms.
title: Update ClimaComms

body:
This PR updates dependencies, including MultiBroadcastFusion.jl.

Supersedes #1707.
title: Update MultiBroadcastFusion.jl
